name: loupsauvage-blockbench-uploader
description: Plugin Blockbench privé pour envoyer des créations GLB vers le portfolio LoupSauvage.

scripts.package: node ../tools/sync-project-version.mjs --check && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$paths = @('loupsauvage_uploader.js','README.md'); if (Test-Path assets) { $paths += 'assets' }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist | Out-Null; Compress-Archive -Force -Path $paths -DestinationPath dist/loupsauvage-uploader-blockbench-plugin.zip"
